AR1.justification: Routed correctly with rationale tied to the strict bar — declined to write decisions.md because an accepted ADR is a future-constraining commitment, logged the hold in daybook; no overreach into followups or observations.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis is not applicable.

AR3.justification: References (daybook/2026-05-17.md, decisions.md, tmp/adr-draft.md) are relative, ISO-date-anchored, and resolve.

AR4.justification: Only action is creating a fresh dated daybook entry; nothing is edited in place, so re-run is coherent.
